items.description: Follow the latest news after the U.S. and Israel launched a massive attack on Iran that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

items.title: Delta Fleet Renewal Reshapes Long Haul Strategy And Investor Trade Offs
items.description: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announces a major long term fleet renewal, including new widebody jet orders from both Airbus and Boeing. The company plans to add next generation aircraft aimed at supporting international route growth and improving fuel efficiency. The order commitments represent a multi year investment that is expected to shape Delta’s global network and capacity planning. Delta is one of the largest global carriers, with a business built around premium corporate travel, a...
